n3.label: Verify Identity
n3.prompt: Can you please verify your full name and account number?

n4.label: Emergency Handled
n4.prompt: Emergency services have been dispatched. Please stay on the line if safe to do so.

n5.label: Verified
n5.prompt: Thank you. Your identity has been verified. How can I assist you today?

n6.label: Not Verified
n6.prompt: I'm sorry, I cannot proceed without identity verification. Please call back when you can provide the required information.
